Tests the `length` property of `Function.prototype.toString` in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a test script that verifies the properties of the `Function.prototype.toString` method in JavaScript. It checks that the `toString` method has a property named `length` and asserts that the value of this `length` property is `0`. The script uses the `assert` function to ensure these conditions are true, which helps confirm the expected behavior of the `toString` method according to the ECMAScript specification. This script provides narrow functionality focused on validating specific characteristics of a built-in JavaScript function.
